dashboard.emptyOrganization: No active gym is available yet.
dashboard.emptyOrganizationDescription: Your sign-in is active, but no gym is connected to this account yet. Owners can create a gym profile from setup.
dashboard.branchScopeMeta: The app uses this branch for check-ins and plans.
dashboard.todayDescription: Check-ins, members, payments, stock, and follow-ups in one management view.
dashboard.sectionDescription: Open the tools for this gym workflow.
dashboard.needsAttentionDescription: Quick links for the work that usually needs action first.
dashboard.showingBranch: Showing data for the active branch
dashboard.setupDescription: Finish these basics so members can join, staff can operate, and the gym link is ready to share.
dashboard.completeGymProfileDetail: Publish your address, join mode, and gym profile page.
dashboard.createFirstPlanDetail: Members need at least one offer before they can join.
dashboard.inviteTeamDetail: Add trainers, reception, and admins before peak hours.
dashboard.shareGymLinkDetail: Open the gym profile page and copy the join link or QR.
dashboard.permissionRequired: This action requires Owner or Admin access.

auditNotes.radioCardGroup: Visible to dashboard operators; permission follows the host form; no audit log.
auditNotes.helpHint: Visible beside dashboard fields and cards; permission follows the host view; no audit log.
auditNotes.managedOn: Visible on read-only operational blocks; permission follows the host view; no audit log.
auditNotes.searchableSelect: Visible on branch, member, plan, and role pickers; permission follows the host form; no audit log.
